subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath broken the seal of the choice wine with the finger of might, and hath sent it down from the heaven of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتح ختم الرحیق باصبع الاقتدار و انزل من سما البیان
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude
